expect: orient.py displays cell blueprint section from parent session. Daughter sessions get pre-computed dispatch + absorption targets without running cell_blueprint.py load. Falsified if: section adds >2s to orient runtime.
actual: section_cell_blueprint() added to orient_monitors.py, re-exported via orient_sections.py, wired into orient.py main() after section_precompact_checkpoint. Runtime: 48.6ms (<2s threshold CONFIRMED). Displays parent session's dispatch hints, absorption targets, next actions, and overdue periodics. Tested: S479 blueprint → S486 orient shows 8-line section with dispatch hint (meta/nk-complexity/expert-swarm) + 6 parent actions + 3 overdue periodics. Voluntary-to-structural conversion: cell_blueprint.py save still manual at handoff, but load is now automatic via orient.py.
diff: Expected orient.py integration without runtime impact: CONFIRMED (48.6ms << 2000ms). Unexpected: parent blueprint from S479 (not S485) — blueprint staleness possible if parent doesn't run cell_blueprint.py save. Follow-up: wire cell_blueprint.py save into sync_state.py for automatic parent-side save.
